negative_prompt: text, subtitles, readable letters, words, numbers, watermark, logo, UI, symbol, diagram, label, hexagon outline, overlay graphics, hard cut, scene transition, morphing, melted geometry, jitter, flicker, low quality, blurry, compression artifacts

shots.caption:
SATURN HAS A
HEXAGON STORM
shots.prompt: premium NASA Cassini science documentary image-to-video from the exact Saturn still. Preserve the exact monochrome spacecraft imagery, cloud bands, polar vortex and planetary framing. Add only subtle true motion: slow orbital camera creep, gentle cloud drift, atmospheric shimmer. Absolutely no text, no symbols, no logos, no diagrams, no labels, no geometric overlays, no scene cut.
